response.justification: The candidate lacks substantial C++ experience and industrial automation domain knowledge, with most of their career focused on web technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) and no demonstrable exposure to IEC 62443, MQTT, REST in industrial contexts, or embedded systems development required for the role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Active open-source contributor with documented technical leadership
Demonstrated ability to mentor and conduct technical workshops
concerns: Minimal C++ experience; no evidence of STL, multi-threading, or high-performance C++ systems
No exposure to industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850) or IEC 62443 security standards
Work history is heavily skewed toward web/mobile, not on-premises/industrial automation platforms
